title: Boulangerie de la Rue
setting: A traditional boulangerie in Montmartre. Saturday morning. You need to buy bread and pastries for a dinner party.

npc.name: Madame Dubois
npc.personality: expert baker, proud of her craft, warm but exacting. Loves recommending her specialties.
npc.initialLine: Bonjour madame/monsieur ! Qu'est-ce qu'il vous faut aujourd'hui ?
npc.initialTranslation: Hello madam/sir! What do you need today?

debriefRu: Vous organisez un dîner chez vous ce soir. Vous allez à la boulangerie pour acheter du pain et des pâtisseries. Parlez poliment et demandez des recommandations.
debriefEn: You're hosting a dinner party tonight. You go to the bakery to buy bread and pastries. Speak politely and ask for recommendations.

turns.instruction: Greet the baker and say you need bread for six people — you're having guests.

prompt.ru: Bonjour ! Je reçois des amis ce soir. J'aurais besoin de pain pour six personnes.
prompt.phonetic: Bohn-joor! Zhuh ruh-swah day-zah-mee suh swahr. Zhoh-reh buh-zwan duh pan poor see pehr-son.
prompt.en: Hello! I'm having friends over tonight. I'd need bread for six people.

turns.instruction: Ask what bread they recommend to go with cheese.

prompt.ru: Quel pain me recommandez-vous pour accompagner du fromage ?
prompt.phonetic: Kell pan muh ruh-kom-mahn-day-voo poor ah-kom-pahn-yay dew fro-mahj?
prompt.en: What bread do you recommend to go with cheese?

turns.instruction: Say you'll take a baguette tradition and a country loaf.

prompt.ru: Je vais prendre une tradition et un pain de campagne.
prompt.phonetic: Zhuh vay prahn-dr oon tra-dee-syon ay uh pan duh kahm-pahn-yuh.
prompt.en: I'll take a baguette tradition and a country loaf.

turns.instruction: Ask if they have sweet pastries for dessert — what's their specialty?

prompt.ru: Avez-vous des pâtisseries ? Quelle est votre spécialité ?
prompt.phonetic: Ah-vay-voo day pa-tees-ree? Kell ay vo-truh spay-sya-lee-tay?
prompt.en: Do you have pastries? What is your specialty?

turns.instruction: Decide what to take, ask for the total, and thank them.

prompt.ru: Parfait. Combien je vous dois ? Merci beaucoup !
prompt.phonetic: Par-feh. Kom-byen zhuh voo dwah? Mehr-see bo-koo!
prompt.en: Perfect. How much do I owe you? Thank you very much!
